title: Face Recognition for Smart Voting
tagline: A Haar Cascade + LBPH pipeline built to make democratic voting tamper-proof — one face, one vote, verified by computer vision
summary: An IEEE-presented study applying computer vision to India's duplicate-vote problem. By combining Haar Cascade face detection with LBPH face recognition in a hybrid pipeline, the system authenticates individual voters biometrically before ballot access — translating a policy challenge into an engineering solution. Presented at Smart GENCON 2021, IEEE Pune Section.
